conviction_board.narrative: HINDALCO scores 50/100 on our engine. Moving averages are bullish. Not pristine, but the kind of structure where you buy dips rather than sell rallies. RSI is at 68 — momentum is real but getting stretched. A consolidation here would be healthy, not alarming. Market headwinds are real — 48% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. Bull case: sustains above ₹1,141 and pushes towards ₹1,220 as trend followers pile in. Bear case: a slip below ₹1,063 triggers trailing stops and dents the short-term thesis. Needs to resolve ₹1,107–₹1,169 before a directional bet pays. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Neutral.
